implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Implements HTTP GET to JSONPlaceholder, parses response, constructs CSV headers and rows, and writes CSV to persistent storage. It still does not filter users by location 'Boone' and continues to write a CSV file even when the returned user array is empty, violating acceptance criteria.
implementation.name: main
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION main:
    SEND HTTP GET request to USERS_URL
    IF response not OK: THROW error
    PARSE JSON into users array
    DEFINE headers list
    MAP users to CSV rows using userToRow
    JOIN headers and rows into CSV string
    CREATE data directory if missing
    WRITE CSV string to CSV_PATH
    LOG saved message

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Converts a single User object into CSV row values. Includes all fields returned from the API and formats them using CSV escaping.
implementation.name: userToRow
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION userToRow(u):
    RETURN array of stringified user fields
    APPLY escapeCsvField to fields containing text

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Escapes commas, quotes, and newlines in CSV fields to maintain valid CSV formatting.
implementation.name: escapeCsvField
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION escapeCsvField(value):
    CONVERT value to string
    IF value contains ',', '"', or '\n':
        RETURN quoted string with escaped quotes
    ELSE:
        RETURN string

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Exposes persisted CSV user information via an API endpoint. Reads the CSV file, converts the content to JSON, and returns it.
implementation.name: GET /api/users
implementation.pseudo_code:
ENDPOINT GET /api/users:
    IF CSV file does not exist: RETURN 404
    READ CSV file from storage
    PARSE CSV using csvToJson
    RETURN JSON array

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Converts CSV text into JSON objects so the API endpoint can return structured user data.
implementation.name: csvToJson
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION csvToJson(csv):
    SPLIT into lines and filter out empty ones
    IF fewer than 2 lines: RETURN empty array
    PARSE header line
    FOR each remaining line:
        PARSE into fields
        MAP fields to header names
    RETURN resulting array

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Parses a CSV line while respecting quoting rules and escaped characters.
implementation.name: parseCsvLine
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION parseCsvLine(line):
    ITERATE characters
    HANDLE quoted and unquoted field segments
    RETURN list of parsed fields

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: No implementation exists. The codebase contains no logic for filtering user data by the 'Boone' location before saving.
implementation.name: filterUsersByLocation

missing_implementations: before saving information check filter for data with location as Boone
If the API request fails or the response is empty, the system does not create or modify the CSV file and signals an error.
